home.heading: Enterprise Dashboard
home.description: Starter scaffold removed. This screen now uses reusable Paper-based atoms.

explore.title: Explore
explore.description: This screen now uses atoms and no longer depends on Expo starter scaffold components.

styleGuide.title: Style Guide
styleGuide.description: Atom showcase built with React Native Paper. Use this screen to validate light and dark theme behavior while the design system evolves.

safeAreaView.title: SafeAreaView

safeAreaView.body: This screen itself is wrapped in the SafeAreaView atom, so top insets are already applied through the shared atom API.
